title: juncus balticus subsp. sitchensis
intro: Juncus balticus subsp. sitchensis, also known as Sitka rush or coastal rush, is a subspecies of Juncus balticus, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rush family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Juncus balticus subsp. sitchensis include reducing inflammation and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
